summary: Parakeratinized odontogenic cysts are more aggressive and have substantially higher recurrence potential—up to 62%—compared to orthokeratinized cysts, which show minimal recurrences (<5%). This makes option B correct based on available evidence.

This makes option B correct based on available evidence.. Answer choice: B
